interview_title: Welcome! Let's get to know you better
interview_description: This quick interview helps us personalize your writing experience

questions.question: What best describes your writing background?
questions.subtitle: Check all that apply
questions.purpose: This helps us understand your skill level and tailor the AI assistance complexity accordingly.

options.label: I've never written a story before
I write professionally (but not published yet)
I blog or write online content
I've written stories but never finished one
I write poetry or short pieces
I write as part of my job

questions.question: Select all the genres that appeal to you
questions.subtitle: Check all that apply
questions.purpose: This helps us suggest appropriate story templates, world-building elements, and genre-specific AI prompts tailored to your interests.

options.label: Sci-fi
options.tooltip: Stories set in the future or alternate realities, featuring advanced technology, space exploration, or scientific concepts

options.label: Romance
options.tooltip: Stories centered on romantic relationships and emotional connections between characters

options.label: Fantasy
options.tooltip: Stories with magical elements, mythical creatures, and imaginary worlds beyond reality

options.label: Mystery
options.tooltip: Stories focused on solving puzzles, crimes, or unexplained events through investigation

options.label: Horror
options.tooltip: Stories designed to frighten, unsettle, or create suspense through supernatural or psychological elements

options.label: Children's
options.tooltip: Stories written for young readers, featuring age-appropriate themes and simple language

options.label: Nonfiction
options.tooltip: True stories, educational content, or informational writing based on real events and facts

options.label: Adventure
options.tooltip: Action-packed stories featuring quests, exploration, and exciting challenges

options.label: Historical Fiction
options.tooltip: Stories set in the past that blend historical facts with fictional characters and events

options.label: Thriller/Suspense
options.tooltip: Fast-paced stories with high stakes, danger, and constant tension

options.label: Literary Fiction
options.tooltip: Character-driven stories focusing on theme, style, and psychological depth

options.label: Young Adult (YA)
options.tooltip: Stories for teens and young adults, often featuring coming-of-age themes

options.label: Dystopian
options.tooltip: Stories set in imagined societies with oppressive control or post-apocalyptic settings

options.label: Comedy/Humor
options.tooltip: Light-hearted stories designed to entertain and make readers laugh

options.label: Slice of Life
options.tooltip: Realistic stories focusing on everyday experiences and character relationships

options.label: Crime/Detective
options.tooltip: Stories following law enforcement or private investigators solving criminal cases

options.label: Paranormal
options.tooltip: Stories featuring supernatural beings like vampires, ghosts, or werewolves in modern settings

options.label: Western
options.tooltip: Stories set in the American Old West, featuring cowboys, outlaws, and frontier life

options.label: War/Military
options.tooltip: Stories centered on warfare, military life, or the impact of conflict on individuals

options.label: Sports
options.tooltip: Stories featuring athletic competition, team dynamics, and personal triumph through sports

options.label: Memoir/Biography
options.tooltip: Personal life stories and experiences, either your own or about real people

options.label: Self-help/How-to
options.tooltip: Instructional content designed to help readers improve skills or solve problems

options.label: Poetry
options.tooltip: Expressive writing using rhythm, imagery, and condensed language to convey emotions

options.label: Graphic Novel/Comics
options.tooltip: Visual storytelling combining illustrations with text in sequential panels

options.label: Magical Realism
options.tooltip: Stories blending realistic settings with subtle magical elements accepted as normal

questions.question: What aspects of writing would you like help with?
questions.subtitle: Check all that apply
questions.purpose: This helps us prioritize which features to highlight and customize your dashboard to show the most relevant tools for your needs.

questions.question: Which best describes your current writing situation?
questions.subtitle: Check all that apply
questions.purpose: This helps us understand where you are in your writing journey so we can provide the most relevant guidance and tools.

options.label: I'm actively writing my first draft
I'm stuck in the middle of my story
I have multiple projects in progress
I've finished a draft and need feedback
I just want to see the home page for now

questions.question: Where would you like to start?
questions.purpose: This helps us take you to the right place based on your needs and experience level.

options.label: Start a Quick Story
options.description: Jump right into writing with our Basic Story editor

options.label: Build a World First
options.description: Create characters, locations, and lore before writing

options.label: Go to Homepage
options.description: Explore all features at your own pace

questions.question: Need some creative inspiration before you start?
questions.purpose: Our AI-powered brainstorming tool can help you develop story ideas, create characters, and explore plot possibilities through an interactive conversation.

modal_content.title: AI Brainstorming Assistant
modal_content.description:
You'll chat with our AI assistant who will:
• Ask questions about your interests and ideas
• Suggest story concepts based on your favorite genres
• Help develop characters, settings, and plot hooks
• Build on any existing ideas you have
• Generate creative 'what if' scenarios
